Grammar: Ch.8 - Esercitazione in classe sui Conditionals (Zero, First, Second, Third) // Nel caso non si siano terminati gli esercizi in classe finirli a casa.

Asked my students why they chose to study this subject , computer studies, and what job prospects does it hold for the future. Spoke about Beirut, in Lebanon, and how approximately 1,000,000 people were asked to leave their homes for ever. I asked the pupils if  they had to abandon their homes within 5 minutes what would they take away with them; what would be essential for them. The students who spoke were given a mark on the electronic register .

Asked the pupils whether they consider themselves to be well organized or not. Got them to tell me about their future plans: job, family, moving abroad. Some students were asked to describe a member of their family that they admire. Next week we will start to look at some technical English regarding their course. I also explained the meaning and pronunciation of some interesting words; such as: audacious, anecdote, fancy.
